examples: A burglar for love is loathsome.
My wounds fester and are loathsome because of my sinful folly.
Punk purists are perhaps the most loathsome gnats in all of creation.
The loathsome thing about the Obama defenders is their intentional misuse of the language to confuse.
But for Nordiques die-hards, junior hockey won't suffice, and rooting for the loathsome Canadiens was never an option.
